description_long: This is a classic yellow New York City taxi cab with a boxy, four-door sedan design. The exterior features a bright yellow paint job with a black-and-white checkered stripe running along the sides, and 'NYC CAB' decals on the front doors. A traditional illuminated 'TAXI' sign is mounted on the roof, and the vehicle has a prominent chrome front grille with dual round headlights on each side. The rear of the car displays a license plate and vertical taillights, while the windows are tinted black. The wheels are standard with black tires and silver hubcaps, and the overall build suggests a sturdy metal frame with glass windows and rubber tires.
description: A classic yellow NYC taxi cab with a checkered stripe, roof taxi sign, and chrome grille, featuring four doors and black-tinted windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the chrome grille, dual round headlights, and roof-mounted taxi sign.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the checkered stripe, 'NYC CAB' decal, four doors, and roof sign.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the license plate, vertical taillights, and trunk.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with checkered stripe, 'NYC CAB' decal, and four doors.
